'''Hormuuz''' was the name of an [[XQ5 Platform]] used by the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] as of [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], located in the [[Gelgelar system/Legends|Gelgelar system]]. It served as a hospital station.

==History==
When [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Task Force Vengeance]] was deployed in the [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]], the Alliance was forced to withdraw from their assets there, including Hormuuz.
In the middle of the [[Evacuation of Gelgelar|evacuation]], the Empire attacked with Assault Gunboats, the Victory Star Destroyer [[Stormhawk (Victory-class)|'' Stormhawk'']] and the Imperial Star Destroyer [[Rage (Imperial-class)|''Rage'']], trying to destroy the fleeing Rebel transports. Eventually the evacuation was complete, Hormuuz however fell into Imperial hands.

Shortly later, the Alliance [[Attack on the Gelgelar system|staged a raid]] against their former station in an effort to reclaim supplies left behind during the evacuation. During the process the station was disabled yet again.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter: Balance of Power Campaigns]]'' {{1st}}
